resources.string: Hyehy…õ URL no w…î wo nhyehy…õe mu.TXT
Paw bere a w…îde y…õ foforo
Ns…õm a W…îab…î ho Nk…îmhy…õ Kratafa
S…õ wop…õ a: URL a w…îahy…õ da ay…õ
Nk…îmhy…õ URL no Nsiesie, Sesa Settings.txt na sesa
W…îay…õ saa app yi updated nanso server a worey…õ connecting no nnyaa inigo plugin no foforo mma Weewx. Ebia fields rentumi nkyer…õ yiye kosi s…õ weewx no b…õba foforo
Y…õsr…õ s…õ tw…õn bere a y…õrehw…õ s…õ URL a wode k…îe no y…õ nokware no
Wogye di s…õ wop…õ s…õ wuyi data nyinaa fi h…î?
Mfomso bi sii bere a na w…îreb…î mm…îden s…õ w…îb…õma dwuma a w…îde di no ay…õ foforo
Na ontumi nk…î anaas…õ woantwe amfi custom URL a w…îakyer…õ no mu
Na ontumi mfa webcam mfonini bi nk…î anaas…õ …întwe mfi wo server so
Na ontumi nk…îka anaas…õ …întwe nk…îmhy…õ no
Forecast Type \'%1$s\' no ny…õ adwuma, hw…õ wo settings fael no na s…î hw…õ bio
Na ontumi mfa radar= mfonini mfi Intan…õt so anaas…õ …întwe
wantumi ank…î so ank…îfa data.txt amfi wo server so anaa antwe
Na ontumi mfa nhyehy…õe no nk…î anaas…õ …întwe mfi wo server no so
W…îde URL no sii h…î s…õ default anaas…õ na hwee nni mu
Na ontumi nk…îka anaas…õ …întwe nk…îmhy…õ no
Nne…õma a W…îde Y…õ Nne…õma a W…îahy…õ Da Ay…õ
Radar URL no ny…õ nea w…îde asi h…î. Wubetumi ak…î nhyehy…õe ahorow mu ak…îsesa
Radar mfonini no da so ara retwe
antumi anni ns…õm a w…îahy…õ ho nk…îm ho dwuma ho dwuma
Anka updated nanso wifi connection no nni h…î
Update interval no ny…õ adwuma, update nhyehy…õe na afei san s…î hw…õ
a woreb…î mm…îden s…õ wob…õtwe data.txt afi wo server so
Radar type \'%1$s\' ny…õ adwuma, hw…õ wo settings fael no na s…î hw…õ bio
Webcam mfonini no da so ara retwe
Webcam URL no ny…õ nea w…îahyehy…õ anaas…õ …õny…õ hwee
Set to manual updates, nanso content cache biara nni h…î de besi nn…õ
Da so ara retwe nk…îmhy…õ data
Fa update times a …õy…õ p…õp…õ…õp…õ di dwuma
K…îk…îb…î: S…õ wob…õma atifi h…î nhyehy…õe no atumi ay…õ adwuma a, ebetumi ama wo batere no ayow nt…õmnt…õm sen s…õnea …õtaa y…õ no
Sie App Debug Ns…õm a W…îakyer…õw
Manual Update Set, Swipe Refresh Screen no na fa wo ho hy…õ mu
Custom URL no nny…õ set, anaas…õ …õy…õ blank. Wubetumi ak…î nhyehy…õe mu de URL a w…îahy…õ da ay…õ aka ho
∆Üsram a edi h…î no mu ns…õm a esisi?
W…înny…õ download anaa app no ‚Äã‚Äãho nhyehy…õe biara
∆Ühyew %1$.1f¬∞%2$s ak…î fam akodu wo anohyeto a …õy…õ %3$.1f¬∞%2$s
∆Ühyew %1$.1f¬∞%2$s ak…î soro akodu wo anohyeto a …õy…õ %3$.1f¬∞%2$s
∆êho hia s…õ w…îb…î wo amanne…õ na w…îab…î wo k…îk…î bere a …îhyew, osut…î anaa osut…î dodow du anohyeto a wode asi h…î no ho no
Esiane s…õ wopow notification permission no mprenu nti, …õs…õ s…õ wo ma …õy…õ adwuma w…î nhyehy…õe mu mmom, fi ase nhyehy…õe?
Osuo %1$.1f%2$s ne wo anohyeto…î a …õy…õ %3$.1f%2$s no ahyia
Osuo %1$.2f%2$s ne wo anohyeto…î a …õy…õ %3$.2f%2$s no ahyia
Osuo dodo…î a …õy…õ %1$.1f%2$s d…înhwerew biara no ne wo anohyeto…î a …õy…õ %3$.1f%2$s no ahyia
Osuo dodo…î a …õy…õ %1$.2f%2$s d…înhwerew biara no ne wo anohyeto…î a …õy…õ %3$.2f%2$s no ahyia
∆êb…î k…îk…î kodu mprenu da biara bere a …îhyew no adu wo anohyeto a woahy…õ no so no
B…î k…îk…î da biara da bere a osu no adu nea woahy…õ no so no
∆êb…î k…îk…î d…înhwerew biara s…õ osu dodow no du anohyeto a wode asi h…î no ho a
